query:
SELECT wh.nomeGestante, wh.templateId, COUNT(*) as total, 
       MIN(wh.sentAt) as primeiroEnvio, MAX(wh.sentAt) as ultimoEnvio
FROM whatsappHistorico wh
WHERE wh.templateId = 60001
AND DATE(wh.sentAt) = CURDATE()
GROUP BY wh.nomeGestante, wh.templateId
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY total DESC
